arts.ttl: Chelsea get prolific striker update as PSG eye ‘DREAM’ BlueCo raid
arts.sum: Emanuel Emegha has emerged as a possible transfer option for Chelsea at the front of their attack, having shone for BlueCo-owned Strasbourg this season. Chelsea get prolific striker update as PSG eye ‘DREAM’ BlueCo raid

arts.ttl: Chelsea ready £50million plus a player transfer to re-sign former star this summer
arts.sum: Chelsea are looking to bring in a new starting centre-back this summer and are ready to go big on Crystal Palace captain Marc Guehi, bringing the England centre-back back to Stamford Bridge

arts.ttl: All change at Chelsea, Man Utd and Liverpool after €110m deal
arts.sum: Juventus are confident that they will be able to keep Kenan Yildiz and Andrea Cambiaso after a fresh injection of cash from their owners, according to Italian media. Due to their lavish spending last year, it had been thought that Juventus would have to make some potentially painful sacrifices this summer, with the likes of Kenan Yildiz and Andrea Cambiaso among the players attracting attention.

arts.ttl: Chelsea predicted lineup vs Ipswich - Premier League
arts.sum: How Chelsea could line up for their Premier League clash with Ipswich.

arts.ttl: Moises Caicedo can hand Enzo Maresca imminent Chelsea boost as ban risk explained
arts.sum: If Enzo Maresca's side want to win, Caicedo will be needed at his best with that likely to be the case after his rest earlier in the week. The Blues are unbeaten in their last three games while also having one foot in the Conference League semi-finals after beating Legia Warsaw 3-0 in Poland earlier this week.

arts.ttl: 2 goals, 4 key passes: 16-G/A star puts on a show in front of Arsenal, Liverpool & Chelsea scouts
arts.sum: RB Leipzig attacker Xavi Simons has been linked with a move away from the club at the end of the season. Premier League clubs Liverpool, Arsenal and Chelsea are keeping tabs on the 21-year-old attacker, and they sent scouts to watch him in action on Friday, as per TBR Football. arts.ttl: Chelsea show 'ruthless' mentality as quadruple bid still on
arts.sum: Chelsea showed their winning mentality with a comeback victory over Liverpool to book another trip to Wembley.

arts.ttl: Chelsea offered chance to REIGNITE pursuit of 'next Mbappe'
arts.sum: PSG star Bradley Barcola is unsure about extending his contract, according to French media. PSG, it is claimed, want to extend the winger's contract and hand him improved terms, but Barcola has made it clear to the Parisians that he will not make a decision before the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Frank Lampard knew from 'day one' under Jose Mourinho that Chelsea could win the Premier League
